task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged in using the administrator credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the Moodle dashboard or site home with the admin user logged in (e.g., 'Admin User' profile visible in the top right corner).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the 'Introduction to Biology' (BIO101) course.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen displays the course page, settings, or participants section specifically for 'Introduction to Biology' or 'BIO101'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the Participants or Enrollment interface for the course.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the 'Participants' page for the BIO101 course, typically displaying a list of current users and an 'Enroll users' button.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent selected Emily Patel and the 'Student' role in the enrollment dialog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Enroll users' modal or form is visible, showing 'Emily Patel' (or 'epatel') selected in the user search field, and 'Student' selected in the assign role dropdown.

task_completion.description: Verify that Emily Patel is successfully enrolled in the course with the Student role.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Participants list for 'Introduction to Biology' (BIO101) explicitly shows 'Emily Patel' (epatel) in the roster with the role 'Student'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Moodle web interface to perform the enrollment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the Moodle UI, rather than a terminal running curl/API commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Moodle application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows a valid URL for Moodle, and the page renders the standard Moodle layout, not a text editor or mock HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by directly modifying the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no screenshots showing SQL clients, phpMyAdmin, or terminal windows executing SQL commands to insert enrollment records.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target User: Emily Patel (username: epatel). Target Course: Introduction to Biology (shortname: BIO101). Target Role: student. The agent must use the Moodle web interface to enroll this specific user into this specific course with the exact role of 'Student'.
